name: Mobile Usability
description: How the product page should be optimised for mobile users with touch interfaces and limited screen space

heuristics.principle: Interactive elements should be easy to tap without precision
checkpoints: Touch targets are at least 44x44 pixels
No accidental taps from elements too close together
Form inputs and selectors are finger-friendly

heuristics.principle: Important information should not be hidden behind excessive scrolling or interaction
checkpoints: Key purchase info visible early in scroll
Critical details not buried in expandable sections
Page length is reasonable for mobile consumption
Important content is prioritised above fold

heuristics.principle: The purchase action should be prioritised within limited screen space
checkpoints: Add to Cart is prominent on mobile layout
Screen space dedicated to conversion actions
Secondary elements do not compete with primary CTA
Mobile layout supports the purchase journey
